subcodes.first_line: May the breath of mercy and good-pleasure descend upon thy radiant dust, thy hallowed spot, and thy resting-place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حی الحیا من الرحمه و الرضوان علی تربتک النوراء و بقعتک البیضاء و جدثک
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
